content:
[ACTIVE] Family Authority Layer

Canonical genealogy & structure:

Root A: Bloodmoon Dynasty (Origin: Iceland)
Root B: Douglas Dynasty (Origin: England)
These are entirely separate root nodes. There is absolutely NO pre-union blood relationship between Wulfnic Bloodmoon and Erik Douglas.

Dynastic Union (Marriage):
Erik Douglas + Nixara Bloodmoon (Married ~1996, Nixara deceased 2005).

First Generation Heirs (Biological children of Erik + Nixara):
Malachia, Noah, Jasper, Alyssa.

Secondary Branch:
Logan Douglas (Erik's younger brother).
Edric Douglas (Logan's son, born 2018).

Surname Authority Mandate:
The hyphenated surname "Douglas-Bloodmoon" is an exceptional dynastic designation reserved EXCLUSIVELY for the four authorized children of the Erik+Nixara union.
Wulfnic and Nixara remain Bloodmoon.
Erik, Logan, and Edric inherit the standard Douglas surname.
Family relationships and surname rules are immutable canonical facts.
keysecondaryRaw: family tree, genealogy, bloodline, dynasty, family structure, douglas-bloodmoon, marriage
name: Family Authority

content:
[ACTIVE] Visual Inheritance Authority

Douglas Dynasty traits: Black hair, Amber eyes (Note: Logan Douglas is an internal variation with blue ocean eyes).
Bloodmoon Dynasty traits: Blonde hair, Blue eyes.

Inheritance baseline:
- Malachia Douglas-Bloodmoon: Douglas-dominant (Black hair, Amber eyes).
- Noah Douglas-Bloodmoon: Bloodmoon-dominant (Blonde hair, Blue eyes).
- Alyssa and Jasper: Genetic fusions (Caramel-brown hair, Mint green eyes).

Resemblance:
Alyssa physically resembles Nixara Bloodmoon most strongly (facial structure, height, body proportions).
Noah resembles the Bloodmoon line in coloration.
Malachia resembles the Douglas line in coloration.
Edric Douglas inherits the standard Douglas visual dominance.

Visual inheritance follows these rules and must remain consistent.
keysecondaryRaw: appearance, looks, physical traits, hair color, eye color, inheritance, genetics, bloodline traits, family resemblance, who resembles who
name: Visual Inheritance

content:
[ACTIVE] Character Authority Layer

Wulfnic Bloodmoon: Patriarch of the Bloodmoon Dynasty. Traditionalist. Family elder. Custodian of Svartúlfr heritage.
Erik Douglas: Patriarch of the Douglas Dynasty. CEO of DCC. Strategic, controlling, highly protective.
Nixara Bloodmoon: The White Moon. Died giving birth to the twins (2005).
Malachia: Oldest sibling. PhD Candidate & Heavyweight boxer. The physical shield.
Noah: Second sibling. 3L JD Candidate at UCLA Law. Diplomatic, legal mind, precise.
Jasper: Twin brother of Alyssa. UCLA Engineering, Hacker, DJ. Rebellious and refuses KSA.
Alyssa: Youngest daughter. Pre-med at UCLA (3.8 GPA). Secret art model for Angel&Co. Protected core.
Logan Douglas: Younger brother of Erik. Runs The Verve (safe haven bar/garage). Grounded, non-corporate.
Edric Douglas: 6-year-old son of Logan.
Kaladin Nargathon: Director of DCC Security (Black Wolf). Former Special Forces (Gamma-7).
Marcus Thornfield: Head of Executive Protection under Kaladin. Alyssa's primary bodyguard.
Angel Moreno: Fashion Photographer/CEO. Alyssa's patron and best friend.

Character roles are canonical and must remain consistent.
keysecondaryRaw: family members, who is who, character roles, douglas family, bloodmoon family, siblings, patriarch
name: Character Authority

content:
[ACTIVE] Bloodmoon Dynasty

Ancient Icelandic dynasty.

Origin: Iceland

The Bloodmoon line migrated to North America after 1930 through Icelandic immigrant parents.
Wulfnic Bloodmoon is the patriarch of the line and the first American-born generation.
Bloodmoon identity carries the blue-eyed, blonde-haired visual inheritance.
The dynasty values tradition, family continuity, old-world discipline, and cultural memory.
keysecondaryRaw: Bloodmoon, Iceland, Icelandic dynasty, Wulfnic, Nixara
name: Bloodmoon Dynasty

content:
[ACTIVE] Douglas Dynasty & DCC

Ancient English-American dynasty.

Origin: England

The Douglas line migrated to North America during the 1700s. The lineage descends from Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas, who founded the Douglas Commercial Company (DCC) in 1666.
Erik Douglas is the current patriarch and CEO.
Douglas identity carries the black-haired, amber-eyed visual inheritance.
The dynasty values authority, structure, corporate hegemony, continuity, and immense family power in Los Angeles.
keysecondaryRaw: Douglas, England, English dynasty, Erik, Los Angeles dynasty
keysRaw: Douglas Dynasty, DCC, Douglas Commercial Company
name: Douglas Dynasty
keywordsRaw: Douglas Dynasty, DCC, Douglas Commercial Company

content:
[ACTIVE] Wulfnic Bloodmoon

Patriarch of the Bloodmoon Dynasty and the father of Nixara Bloodmoon. He is the maternal grandfather of Malachia, Noah, Jasper, and Alyssa.
Age: 76 (born 1948). First American-born Bloodmoon.
Wulfnic is old-world, traditional, formal, and highly protective of his descendants. He distrusts modern trends, acting as the custodian of the ancestral Svartúlfr heritage and cultural memory.
In old age he has long silver-white hair, pale skin, and blue eyes faded by time. In youth he was blond with bright blue eyes.
He speaks formally and treats lineage as sacred.
keysecondaryRaw: Wulfnic, Bloodmoon Patriarch, Patriarch, Grandfather, Nixara's Father
name: Wulfnic

content:
[HISTORICAL] Nixara Bloodmoon

The daughter of Wulfnic Bloodmoon and the wife of Erik Douglas. She is the mother of Malachia, Noah, Jasper, and Alyssa Douglas-Bloodmoon.
Known as the White Moon, she was compassionate, gentle, patient, emotionally intelligent, and deeply family-centered.
Her appearance was pale and luminous, with blonde hair and ice blue eyes (Primary Maternal Morphological Template).
Nixara died in 2005 giving birth to the twins, Jasper and Alyssa. Her memory remains the emotional anchor of the entire family.
keysecondaryRaw: Nixara, White Moon, Erik's Wife, Mother, Bloodmoon Matriarch
name: Nixara

content:
[ACTIVE] Erik Douglas

The patriarch of the Douglas Dynasty, CEO of Douglas Commerce Company (DCC), and the husband of the late Nixara Bloodmoon.
Age: 54 (born 1970). Former UCLA Football Quarterback & Captain (5x champion) and ex-KSA President.
Erik is authoritative, highly protective, controlled, strategic, and family-first. Before Nixara, he was a quarterback who happened to be an heir; after her death, he became a severe patriarch burdened by duty. He raised his four children alone, carrying himself like a corporate monarch built around extreme responsibility and pressure.
He has black hair (streaked with silver) and amber eyes, massive muscular build (205 cm).
keysecondaryRaw: Erik, Douglas Patriarch, Patriarch, Father, CEO Father
name: Erik

content:
[ACTIVE] Malachia Douglas-Bloodmoon

The eldest core sibling and executive successor candidate.
Age: 28 (born 1996). 5th-Year PhD Candidate in Sport Sciences at UCLA. Professional heavyweight boxer and MMA Fighter.
He inherits the Douglas visual line completely: black hair, amber eyes, 210 cm tall, built like a tank.
Malachia is strong, stoic, protective, and deeply responsible. He acts as the family's physical shield and is mentored by Kaladin Nargathon for executive security leadership. His presence feels controlled and dangerous when needed, but calm around family.
keysecondaryRaw: Malachia, The Wall, Oldest Son, Douglas Son, Family Shield
name: Malachia

content:
[ACTIVE] Noah Douglas-Bloodmoon

The second core sibling.
Age: 25 (born 1999). 3L Juris Doctor Candidate at UCLA School of Law. KSA Alumni.
Noah has the strongest Bloodmoon visual inheritance: blonde hair, blue eyes, and an elegant swimmer's build (196 cm).
He is precise, calm, strategic, and polished. He reads as measured and controlled, acting as the legal and diplomatic mind of the family. His cool exterior hides how deeply he carries the family's pressure.
keysecondaryRaw: Noah, Velvet Glove, Bloodmoon Son, Legal Mind, Precise
name: Noah

content:
[ACTIVE] Jasper Douglas-Bloodmoon

Twin brother of Alyssa.
Age: 19 (born April 22, 2005). First-Year Engineering Undergraduate at UCLA.
He is a genetic fusion of both lines: caramel-brown hair, mint green eyes, and a lean athletic build (191 cm).
He is rebellious, sharp, creative, and hard to control. An active hacker, DJ, and hypebeast who explicitly refuses legacy recruitment into the Kappa Sigma Alpha (KSA) fraternity despite family pressure. He shares a deep empathic twin bond with Alyssa.
keysecondaryRaw: Jasper, Twin Brother, Rebellious, DJ, Hacker
name: Jasper

content:
[ACTIVE] Alyssa Douglas-Bloodmoon

Twin sister of Jasper.
Age: 19 (born April 22, 2005). First-Year Pre-Med Undergraduate at UCLA with a 3.8 GPA. Future ambition: Neuropsychiatry or Biogenetics.
She is a genetic fusion (caramel-brown hair, mint green eyes) but holds the strongest physical resemblance to Nixara (petite hourglass, 165 cm).
Alyssa is the emotional gravity point of the family—affectionate, trusting, naive, and fiercely protected (Protected Core) by her father and brothers, with Marcus Thornfield as her primary executive protector.
Secretly, she works as an art model for Angel Moreno to gain a sliver of independence.
Physical Details: Soft pampered habits, completely defenseless in physical combat. Vitals: Keen hearing, resting 70 bpm, 36.5°C.
Wardrobe & Intimacy: Favors sunflower-yellow palette and oversized men's clothes (size-difference dynamics). Demisexual, Panromantic. Craves physical touch, acts of service, and praise.
keysecondaryRaw: Alyssa, Lys, Sunflower, Twin Sister, Protected Core
name: Alyssa

content:
[ACTIVE] Logan Douglas

Erik's younger brother and uncle to the core siblings.
Age: 40s. Father to Edric Douglas. Mechanical Engineer and KSA Alumni.
He has black hair, blue ocean eyes (maternal Douglas lineage variation), and a broad muscular build (198 cm).
Logan is laid-back, grounded, protective, and decidedly non-corporate. He runs 'The Verve', a bar and mechanical garage that serves as a PMC-free safe haven for the family.
keysecondaryRaw: Logan, Uncle Logan, The Verve
name: Logan

content:
[ACTIVE] Kaladin Nargathon

Director of DCC Security — Black Wolf Division. Reports directly to Erik Douglas.
Age: 33. Former US Army Special Forces Major from Task Force Gamma-7 ("The Hounds").
Callsigns: Maggiore Nargathon, Lycos, Il Mastino.
He has a tactical black ponytail, forest green eyes, a scarred right eyebrow, and a Gamma-7 tattoo. Massive, athletic build (193 cm).
Oversees global executive protection, strategy, and mentors Malachia in security governance.
keysecondaryRaw: Maggiore Nargathon, Lycos, Il Mastino, Director of Security, Black Wolf
name: Kaladin

content:
[ACTIVE] Marcus Thornfield

Head of Executive Protection under the DCC Security — Black Wolf Division.
Callsign: Iron. Reports to Kaladin Nargathon.
Former US Army Special Forces operator (Task Force Gamma-7).
His primary, absolute assignment is the close protection and executive movement security of Alyssa Douglas-Bloodmoon.
keysecondaryRaw: Marcus, Iron, Bodyguard, Head of Executive Protection
name: Marcus

content:
[ACTIVE] Angel Moreno

Secondary Canon Character. Age 32.
He is a wealthy Fashion Photographer, Creative Director, and Social Media Strategist at his own boutique firm, 'Angel & Co'.
He has platinum blonde hair with professionally dyed fuchsia mesh/highlights and a sharp, avant-garde style.
He serves as a patron and mentor to Alyssa, funding her secret modeling gig to give her an independent outlet away from her family's control. He maintains a cautious distance from Erik Douglas and an old, formalized rivalry with Wulfnic.
(Note: Exclusively human in the contemporary baseline).
keysecondaryRaw: Angel, Angel & Co, Photographer
name: Angel

content:
[ACTIVE] Edric Douglas

Son of Logan Douglas.
Age: 6 years old (born 2018).
He represents the second generation of the Douglas line in LA, parallel to Erik's children. As a direct Douglas (not Douglas-Bloodmoon union), he inherits the standard Douglas surname and is expected to develop dominant Douglas visual traits.

content:
[ACTIVE] Contemporary Los Angeles Setting

Douglas Estate: Primary residence. Gated Beverly Hills compound with extreme PMC perimeter and biometric grids. Features Erik's Throne Room, Malachia's East Wing, Alyssa's Solarium, Jasper's DJ set, Noah's kitchens.

The Verve: Exclusive nightclub and mechanical workshop owned by Logan Douglas. A strict PMC-free social safe-zone.

UCLA Campus: The academic setting for the younger generation (Malachia, Noah, Jasper, Alyssa).

DCC Security (Black Wolf Division): The PMC force protecting the family. Commanded by Kaladin Nargathon, replacing the defunct Vanguard PMC.

Seven Hills: The Douglas ancestral estate and DCC Heritage Site.

content:
[ACTIVE] Contemporary Visual DNA & Aesthetics

Environment: Brutalist concrete, expansive glass walls, rich mahogany interiors. Atmosphere: Los Angeles smog filtered through golden hour light, high contrast shadows (Rembrandt lighting).
Color Palette: Gold, Amber, Walnut, Black (Primary); Charcoal, Gunmetal, Warm Bronze (Secondary); Crimson (threat/blood), Ice Blue (tech/coldness) (Accents).
Style: Modern billionaire dynasty, old money luxury, bespoke suits, cashmere, leather upholstery, crystal glassware.
Directives: Maintain painterly realism, warm cinematic lighting, deep shadows, and luxury visual storytelling.

content:
[ACTIVE] DJ Frequency

Jasper Douglas-Bloodmoon leads a secret double life as 'DJ Frequency', an anonymous underground electronic music sensation in Los Angeles. He operates from his 'Blackroom' (a highly saturated tech/audio workshop). This represents his rebellion against the suffocating Douglas-Bloodmoon family lockdown and KSA legacy expectations.

comment: Historical Canon: Foundation of the DCC
content:
[HISTORICAL] Douglas Commercial Lineage

The Douglas Dynasty's commercial power originates from Merchant House Douglas, established in England in 1666 by Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas. Lord Cornelius later served as Governor of the California colony, laying the historical and geographical foundation for the modern Douglas Commerce Company (DCC).
keysecondaryRaw: Merchant House Douglas, 1666, California colony, Governor
keysRaw: Douglas Commercial Lineage, Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas
name: Douglas Lineage (Historical)
keywordsRaw: Douglas Commercial Lineage, Lord Cornelius Vance Douglas

content:
[HISTORICAL] Edric Ættfaðir Svartúlfa

The earliest documented founder of the ancestral Svartúlfr (Black Wolf) lineage. Dating back to 725 AD (Vendel Period, Scandinavia) before the Viking Age. While there is a genealogical gap between 725 AD and the 1930s Icelandic migration, the Svartúlfr name tradition and cultural identity persist through the Bloodmoon line. No supernatural elements apply.
keysecondaryRaw: Aettfadir, Svartulfr origin, 725 AD, Vendel Period
name: Edric Ættfaðir Svartúlfa (Historical)

content:
[ACTIVE] DCC Security — Black Wolf Division

A Private Military Contractor division operating under the Douglas Commerce Company's corporate structure. Commanded by Kaladin Nargathon (Director) and Marcus Thornfield (Head of Executive Protection). Replaces the defunct independent Vanguard PMC. Responsible for the absolute protection of the Douglas family and DCC assets globally, securing the Douglas Estate perimeter and providing close protection to the heirs.

content:
[ACTIVE] University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA)

A major public research university located in the Westwood neighborhood of Los Angeles. UCLA is the academic hub for the younger generation of the Douglas-Bloodmoon family, including Malachia (PhD Candidate in Sport Sciences), Noah (3L Law), Jasper (First-Year Engineering), and Alyssa (First-Year Pre-Med). Their mascot is the Bruins, and the campus serves as a narrative counterpart to the strict control of the Douglas Estate.
keysecondaryRaw: Westwood, campus, college
name: UCLA

content:
[ACTIVE] UCLA Campus Life (Greek Life & USAC)

UCLA features a robust parallel social infrastructure consisting of Greek Life (fraternities and sororities) and over 1,000 student organizations. This ecosystem is funded and regulated by the Undergraduate Students Association Council (USAC), a highly influential student government. The most prominent Greek organization for the Douglas family is Kappa Sigma Alpha (KSA), an elite fraternity with deep legacy ties to Erik and Noah, which Jasper actively refuses to join.
keysecondaryRaw: fraternity, sorority, student government
keysRaw: Greek Life, USAC, Student Organizations, Kappa Sigma Alpha, KSA
name: UCLA Campus Life
keywordsRaw: Greek Life, USAC, Student Organizations, Kappa Sigma Alpha, KSA

content:
[ACTIVE] Douglas Estate

The primary residence and symbolic seat of the Douglas family in Los Angeles. Located in North Beverly Hills, this multi-acre, highly surveilled, gated compound is secured by the DCC Black Wolf Division. Key areas include Erik's Throne Room, Malachia's East Wing bunker, Alyssa's Solarium, Jasper's DJ set, and Noah's kitchens. It represents old-world tradition fused with modern corporate power and extreme protectionism.
keysecondaryRaw: estate, mansion, compound
keysRaw: Douglas Estate, Beverly Hills compound, Throne Room
name: Douglas Estate
keywordsRaw: Douglas Estate, Beverly Hills compound, Throne Room

content:
[ACTIVE] Douglas Customs

Logan Douglas's personal automotive workshop, located in a converted industrial property in the Arts District of Downtown Los Angeles (just blocks from The Verve). The shop specializes in vehicle restoration, fabrication, and performance work. It represents Logan's hands-on, working-class technical identity—an unglamorous retreat and physical escape from the family's suffocating corporate expectations.
keysecondaryRaw: garage, Arts District, mechanic
name: Douglas Customs

content:
[ACTIVE] Rose Bowl Stadium

Located in Pasadena, roughly 25 miles from the UCLA campus. The Rose Bowl is the iconic home venue of UCLA Bruins football. In the narrative, it functions as a major public spectacle arena where private Douglas family dynamics become highly visible to the world, and serves as a real-world testing ground for Malachia's PhD research in sports biomechanics and performance.
keysecondaryRaw: Pasadena, stadium, football game
name: Rose Bowl Stadium

content:
[ACTIVE] Santa Monica Waterfront

A coastal recreation area comprising the beach, pier, and boardwalk in Santa Monica, roughly 15-20 minutes west of UCLA. It acts as neutral territory accessible to all narrative factions. For the Douglas-Bloodmoon heirs, Santa Monica represents an escape—a temporary reprieve from both the intense pressure of the Beverly Hills estate and the academic stress of the Westwood campus.

content:
[ACTIVE] Seven Hills Estate

The ancestral seat of the Douglas family in California, established circa 1740 as the regional headquarters of the Douglas Commercial Company (DCC). Featuring a restored 1700s Georgian-style villa set on expansive grazing land and woodland. It represents the deepest layer of Douglas family identity in America, serving as the historical root of their commercial power and a living connection to their 1666 Merchant House lineage.
keysRaw: Seven Hills, Seven Hills Estate, ancestral estate
name: Seven Hills Estate
keywordsRaw: Seven Hills, Seven Hills Estate, ancestral estate

content:
[ACTIVE] UCLA Campus

The physical university setting in the Westwood neighborhood of Los Angeles. Spanning 405 acres, its traditional collegiate architecture (including the iconic twin-towered Royce Hall) contrasts with modern facilities. For the younger Douglas-Bloodmoon generation, the campus represents a space of relative freedom, personal identity formation, and independence, standing in direct narrative tension with the strict surveillance and control of the Douglas Estate.
name: UCLA Campus

content:
[ACTIVE] Verve Lounge

An upscale lounge, bar, and music venue occupying a converted industrial warehouse in the Arts District of Downtown Los Angeles. Owned and operated by Logan Douglas, it features exposed brick, steel beams, and a creative, urban atmosphere. Crucially, The Verve is an explicit PMC-free zone, making it a rare safe haven where Douglas family members can interact without biometric surveillance or corporate pressure.
keysRaw: Verve Lounge, The Verve, Arts District
name: Verve Lounge
keywordsRaw: Verve Lounge, The Verve, Arts District

content:
[ACTIVE] Kappa Sigma Alpha (KSA)

An elite UCLA-affiliated fraternity that serves as a multi-generational tradition for the Douglas men. Erik Douglas is a former KSA President, and it was at a KSA event roughly thirty years ago that he first met Nixara Bloodmoon. Logan, Malachia, and Noah are all KSA alumni. Jasper Douglas-Bloodmoon is currently legacy-eligible but explicitly refuses membership, a point of ongoing family friction.
keysRaw: Kappa Sigma Alpha, KSA, KSA fraternity
name: Kappa Sigma Alpha
keywordsRaw: Kappa Sigma Alpha, KSA, KSA fraternity

content:
[HISTORICAL] The 1996 Championship Game

A defining piece of Douglas-Bloodmoon family lore. In 1996, during the college football championship finals, Erik Douglas abandoned the game at halftime to rush to the hospital for the birth of his first son, Malachia. Because he walked out, his team fell apart on the field. It went down in history as the only football game Erik Douglas ever lost in his entire life. When asked about it, Erik's only response was: "The scoreboard could wait. She couldn't."
keysecondaryRaw: Rose bowl, lost game, championship
name: The 1996 Championship
